{{CargoRelic
|name=DRMC
|rank=AAA
|affct=FAME
|birthday=07-12
|source=Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Wishing (0.14%), Relic Forge (80 Relic RF)
|description=On Jul 12, 1789, the most important declaration of France was issued for the first time.

This declaration was issued during the French Revolution. More than a month ago, angry citizens of Paris picked up weapons, swarmed the Bastille, and destroyed it. Driven by people's will, France established a constituent assembly and issued a Declaration of Human Rights. It stated the principles of the Separation of Powers, equality before the law, and the sancrosanctity of private properties. 

[Famous Quotes]

People are born free. Everyone has the right to freedom of thought, conscience and religion. The law only has the right to prohibit behaviors that are harmful to society. Property is an inviolable and sacred right.
|fame=74
|art=46
|fth=38
|civ=48
|tech=37
|ss1=Per 10k Relic Points, Snail DEF +5<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 180,000/180,000
|ss2=Per 10k Relic Points, Snail DEF +5<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 240,000/240,000
|ss3=Per 10k Relic Points, Snail DEF +5<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 300,000/300,000
|ss4=Per 10k Relic Points, Snail DEF +5<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 420,000/420,000
|ss5=Per 10k Relic Points, Snail DEF +5<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 540,000/540,000
|ss7=Per 10k Relic Points, Snail DEF +5<br>Per 10k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +5<br>Relic Points: 540,000/540,000<br>Snail RUSH +70
|skill1=[[File:Genesim skill II.png|50px]]Place in Gene Sim Device: Fire DMG +60
|skill2=[[File:Genesim skill II.png|50px]]Place in Gene Sim Device: This Relics FAME +10
}}
[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:FAME Relics]]
[[Category:Purple FAME Relics]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Simulation Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Lottery Draws]]
